title: Everbuild Multipurpose Wood Filler – Suitable For Indoor And Outdoor Use – Sandable – White – 250ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
READY TO USE – Comes ready-mixed for easy application making it ideal for sealing nail holes, cracks, gaps and minor imperfections in wood as quickly as you need.
SUITABLE FOR INTERIOR AND EXTERIOR USE – Fix blemishes inside and out with this filler which is waterproof when dry.
SOLVENT-FREE MIX – Made using a water-based recipe resulting in a non-flammable and low-odour filler.
EASY TO APPLY – Simply apply the amount required, smooth it off and leave it to dry before sanding and staining/painting/varnishing as you like.
FAST CURING – Depending on the application, this fast-setting mix is touch-dry in only 15 minutes, sandable in 30 and over-paintable in as little as 2 hours for your quick DIY fixes.

MULTIPLE COLOURS – 250ml tub versions of this product are available in light stainable, medium stainable, pine, mahogany, light oak, dark oak, teak and white with light stainable also available as a 100ml tube.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Before applying, ensure surfaces are clean, dry, sound and free from dust or any contaminants which may affect adhesion. Stir well before use and apply with a spreader or knife. Fill the hole proud to allow for sanding. Once dry, sand to a smooth finish and apply required stain. The video showcases the product in use.
